title: Watch: Pope Leo XIV spins basketball on his finger, with help from Harlem Globetrotters
summary_full: US exhibition squad, the Harlem Globetrotters, met the pontiff in the Vatican, helping him to spin a basketball on the tip of his finger.
summary_public: US exhibition squad, the Harlem Globetrotters, met the pontiff in the Vatican, helping him to spin a basketball on the tip of his finger.
